since_last: 47% of 89 AI names green; AI Applications & Data Software leads +3.05%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a mixed, rotational tape, 47% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.57% · BTC -0.51% · Gold +0.86% · Nasdaq100 -1.54%. 47% of 89 AI names are green — a mixed, rotational tape. AI Applications & Data Software is doing the heavy lifting at +3.05%.

cards.headline: AI Applications & Data Software leads, Chip Equipment & AI Hardware lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Applications & Data Software at +3.05%; weakest is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at -4.08%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: TER is the standout at -8.73%
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -1.73% at $150.35
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -1.73% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
